reviews.comment:
Estación acorde , buena atención,  le ponen mucha onda los chicos, afuera tenes un solárium para comer o tomar algo del full, baños limpios

(Translated by Google)
Convenient station, good service, the staff are very friendly, there's a solarium outside where you can eat or have a drink, clean bathrooms
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR1dElyN2F3EAE

reviews.comment:
Los baños en todo momento están impecables. La atención de todo el personal siempre es para destacar!!!!! La variedad de comida que tienen es increíble. Se puede comer ahí o llevar! El sistema es muy ágil!! Al agua para el termo es gratis.

(Translated by Google)
The restrooms are always spotless. The staff's service is always outstanding! The food selection is incredible. You can eat in or take away! The system is very efficient! Hot water for your thermos is free.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR1Z3RuVDhnRRAB
